ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the pipeline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pipeline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pipeline was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pipeline was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pipeline (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the pipeline */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pipeline */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the pipeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "op_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline the operation belongs to */,
  "op_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "op_description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "op_type" TEXT /* Type of the operation (e.g., CreateModel, Transpose) */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the operation in the pipeline (e.g., data preprocessing, model training) */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for the operation (e.g., Q, MAP) */,
  "ninputs" INTEGER /* Number of inputs to the operation */,
  "noutputs" INTEGER /* Number of outputs from the operation */,
  "forward" INTEGER /* Forward pass indicator (1 for forward, 0 for backward) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Computational cost of the operation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the operation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the operation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES pipelines ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the input belongs to */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of the input (e.g., data, parameter) */,
  "input_value" TEXT /* Value of the input */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the input was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the input was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_inputs_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the output belongs to */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of the output (e.g., model, data) */,
  "output_value" TEXT /* Value of the output */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the output was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the output was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_outputs_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation that depends on another operation */,
  "dependent_op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation it depends on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_dependencies_dependent_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_dependencies_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_metrics_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the operation */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_versions_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipelines_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the pipeline */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipelines_versions_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES pipelines ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pipeline or operation */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline being accessed */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the pipeline or operation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_source" TEXT /* Source of access (e.g., API, UI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES pipelines ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipelines_operations" (
  "pipeline_op_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline-operation relationship */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipelines_operations_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES pipelines ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipelines_operations_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_comments_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline the permission is for */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipeline_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_tags_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES pipelines ("pipeline_id")
)
